description_long: This is a modern outdoor chaise with a boxy, geometric silhouette and a woven rattan-style exterior in a gray tone. The seat and backrest are fitted with thick, plush, off-white cushions that provide comfort and contrast visually with the darker frame. The backrest is tall and slightly reclined, offering ergonomic support, while the armrests are broad and flat, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive look. The woven texture of the frame gives it a contemporary yet natural appearance, suitable for patios, parks, or urban lounge areas. The base is solid and fully enclosed, with no visible legs, contributing to a sturdy and grounded presence. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements beyond the woven pattern.
description: A modern, boxy chaise with a gray woven rattan-style frame and thick off-white cushions, featuring broad armrests and a tall, supportive backrest. The design is minimalist and sturdy, ideal for outdoor urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, thick off-white cushions, and broad armrests, highlighting the inviting and comfortable design.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight, flat profile of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full woven rattan-style back and the top of the backrest cushion, emphasizing the solid, enclosed base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest, cushion thickness, and the clean, straight lines of the frame.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and slightly reclined, with a single large off-white cushion that is smooth and unsegmented. It has a clean, minimalist appearance with no visible tufting, buttons, or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both sides feature wide, flat armrests that are integrated into the frame and match the height of the seat and backrest.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the base is a fully enclosed box structure with the woven rattan-style material extending to the ground, giving a solid and grounded look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery on the cushions is solid off-white fabric with a smooth, untextured appearance and no visible patterns or tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large, loose cushions: one for the seat and one for the backrest, both thick and plush, with the backrest cushion slightly taller and the seat cushion covering the entire seating area.
